data.title: [ccc3-954a] GREEN: Implement scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py at repo root
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What to do
Create scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py at REPO ROOT. Classifies each plugins/dso reference as runtime (code blocks, tool calls) or prose (backtick paths in flowing text) and applies the appropriate transformation. NO annotation bypass — every reference must be converted.

## Classification
Runtime (→ ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/path): inside fenced code blocks, after Read(/Glob(/Grep(/Bash(, lines starting with cat/source/bash/sh
Prose (→ strip plugins/dso/ prefix): backtick paths in flowing sentences

## CLI
python3 scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py [--dry-run] [--verbose] [--runtime-only] <target_dirs...>

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists at repo root
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py
- [ ] All 7+ unit tests pass GREEN
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py -v
- [ ] Script produces NO plugin-self-ref-ok annotations
  Verify: ! python3 scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py --dry-run plugins/dso/agents/ 2>&1 | grep -q "plugin-self-ref-ok"
